description: A billing_service is throwing database overload errors — but it is a downstream victim, not the cause. The real failure is cache memory exhaustion propagating through payment_service and inventory_service. An agent that stops at billing_service and blames the database will be penalised. Trace the full dependency chain to find the true root cause.

logs: [ERROR] frontend: request timeout after 30s — order_service unresponsive
[WARN]  frontend: degraded mode enabled, showing cached catalogue
[INFO]  frontend: 43% of requests are timing out
[ERROR] frontend: checkout flow broken — downstream order_service error
[ERROR] order_service: payment_service call timed out after 10s
[ERROR] order_service: inventory_service call timed out after 10s
[WARN]  order_service: thread pool saturated — queue depth 1200
[INFO]  order_service: circuit breaker OPEN for payment_service
[ERROR] payment_service: redis GET timeout after 5s (cache unavailable)
[WARN]  payment_service: failing open — skipping cache, hitting DB directly
[INFO]  payment_service: DB load increased 8x due to cache bypass
[ERROR] payment_service: transaction lock contention on orders table
[ERROR] inventory_service: redis SET timeout after 5s
[WARN]  inventory_service: cache miss rate 100% — all reads bypassing cache
[ERROR] inventory_service: stock level reads are stale by >30s
[INFO]  inventory_service: fallback to slow DB path active
[FATAL] cache: used_memory 7.98GB / maxmemory 8GB — eviction policy active
[ERROR] cache: OOM command not allowed — maxmemory reached, keys evicted
[WARN]  cache: evicted 2.1M keys in last 60s (allkeys-lru policy)
[INFO]  cache: connection count 4821 — approaching ulimit
[WARN]  cache: replication lag 8.2s — replica falling behind
[ERROR] billing_service: database query timeout after 8s — overloaded?
[ERROR] billing_service: invoice generation failed — DB connection pool exhausted (pool_size=20, waiting=47)
[WARN]  billing_service: falling back to async invoice queue — SLA at risk
[ERROR] billing_service: redis session cache unavailable — re-authenticating every request
[CRIT]  billing_service: 55% of billing requests failing — page on-call immediately

initial_alerts: CRITICAL: billing_service error rate 55% — invoice generation failing
WARNING:  frontend checkout success rate dropped to 57%
